name: 中通り (Nakadōri)
author: ahkimn
description:
Highly-detailed map of the historic region of 中通り(中通り) in 福島県 (Fukushima Prefecture). The map covers much of the relatively flat, fertile valley of the 阿武隈川 (Abukuma River) in the center of the prefecture, extending from 郡山 (Kōriyama), the prefecture's premier commercial city to 福島, the prefecture's administrative heart and capital.

Demand data is sourced from the 2020/2021 Japanese census data, and the map includes special demand for primary/secondary/post-secondary education + airports + ports + hospitals + various cultural attractions"
data_source: 統計局・令和２年国勢調査・令和3年経済センサス
